Our Programmes

Tutorial Classes & Courses

Expert-led classes across all major subjects to prepare students for excellence in every examination.

JAMB / UTME

JAMB Intensive Prep

Complete coverage of all JAMB subjects — English, Maths, Physics, Chemistry, Biology and more.

WAEC / NECO

WAEC & NECO Coaching

O'Level preparation with past questions, marking schemes and expert-guided practice sessions.

Sciences

Science Subjects

Physics, Chemistry, Biology and Maths taught with practical demonstrations and real-world examples.

Arts & Commercial

Arts & Social Sciences

Literature, Economics, Government, Civic Education and more — taught by experienced educators.

Language

English Language

Comprehension, essay writing, grammar and oral English — essential for every student's exam success.

Special Programme

Remedial Classes

Dedicated support for students needing extra attention — nobody gets left behind here.

Admission Guidance

Your Sure Admission Plug

Getting into your dream university requires more than a good JAMB score — you need the right strategy, the right guidance, and the right team behind you.

Sir Philip's Academy is your all-in-one admission solution. From JAMB preparation to Post-UTME coaching, we guide you every step of the way until that admission letter arrives.

📲 Get Admission Guidance
SP
About Us

Built on a Foundation of Excellence

Sir Philip's Academy was founded with one mission: to give every Nigerian student the preparation, support and confidence they need to excel in their examinations and secure their future.

Under the leadership of Sir Philip, our academy has guided hundreds of students into top universities, helping them achieve JAMB scores and WAEC grades that open doors to remarkable futures.

We believe every student has the potential to excel. Our expert tutors, structured curriculum, and close-knit community make the difference.

🎯

Expert Tutors

Experienced teachers who know exactly what exams require.

📚

Proven Curriculum

Lessons built around past questions and exam patterns.

🏆

Track Record

Hundreds of students scoring 300+ in JAMB every year.

🤝

Supportive Community

A family where students motivate each other to succeed.

Testimonials

What Our Students Say

Don't just take our word for it — hear from students who transformed their results with us.

★★★★★

Sir Philip's Academy changed everything for me. I scored 318 in JAMB after failing the previous year. The tutors never gave up on me even when I almost gave up on myself.
